Title: [55-01] Audit loading states: Auth pages
Description:
Check auth pages have loading states.

**Pages:**
- /login
- /signup
- /forgot-password

**Checklist:**
- [ ] Skeleton shown during load
- [ ] Button disabled while submitting

**Time:** ~15 min

Title: [55-02] Audit loading states: Dashboard pages 1-15
Description:
Check dashboard pages 1-15 have loading states.

**Checklist:**
- [ ] Loading skeleton present
- [ ] No content flash
- [ ] Suspense boundaries

**Time:** ~30 min

Title: [55-03] Audit loading states: Dashboard pages 16-30+
Description:
Check remaining dashboard pages.

**Checklist:**
- [ ] Loading skeleton present
- [ ] No content flash
- [ ] Suspense boundaries

**Time:** ~30 min

Title: [55-04] Audit empty states consistency
Description:
Verify empty states follow design pattern.

**Checklist:**
- [ ] Icon present
- [ ] Clear message
- [ ] CTA button
- [ ] Consistent styling

**Time:** ~25 min

Title: [55-05] Audit error boundaries coverage
Description:
Verify error.tsx files exist.

**Checklist:**
- [ ] Each route group has error.tsx
- [ ] ErrorFallback renders correctly
- [ ] Reset button works

**Time:** ~20 min

Title: [56-01] Mobile responsive: Auth pages
Description:
Test auth pages on mobile viewport.

**Test at:** 375px, 414px, 768px

**Checklist:**
- [ ] No horizontal scroll
- [ ] Touch targets 44px min
- [ ] Readable text

**Time:** ~20 min

Title: [56-02] Mobile responsive: Dashboard layout
Description:
Test dashboard layout on mobile.

**Checklist:**
- [ ] Sidebar collapses
- [ ] Content readable
- [ ] Charts resize

**Time:** ~25 min

Title: [56-03] Mobile responsive: Forms
Description:
Test form inputs on mobile.

**Checklist:**
- [ ] Input fields full width
- [ ] Labels visible
- [ ] Date pickers work

**Time:** ~20 min

Title: [56-04] WCAG audit: Keyboard navigation
Description:
Test keyboard accessibility.

**Checklist:**
- [ ] Tab order logical
- [ ] Focus visible
- [ ] Escape closes modals
- [ ] Arrow keys work in menus

**Time:** ~30 min

Title: [56-05] WCAG audit: Color and ARIA
Description:
Test color contrast and ARIA.

**Checklist:**
- [ ] 4.5:1 contrast ratio
- [ ] ARIA labels present
- [ ] Role attributes correct

**Time:** ~30 min

Title: [57-01] Bundle analysis: Generate report
Description:
Run webpack-bundle-analyzer.

**Output:**
- Bundle size report
- Top 10 largest deps
- Duplicate modules

**Time:** ~15 min

Title: [57-02] Bundle analysis: Fix large deps
Description:
Address top bundle contributors.

**Common fixes:**
- Tree shake lodash
- Dynamic import heavy components
- Remove unused deps

**Time:** ~30 min

Title: [57-03] Code split: Route-based splitting
Description:
Verify routes are code split.

**Check:**
- [ ] Dynamic imports for heavy pages
- [ ] Shared chunks reasonable
- [ ] No oversized chunks

**Time:** ~25 min

Title: [57-04] Dead code elimination
Description:
Remove unused exports.

**Tools:**
- ts-prune
- knip

**Time:** ~30 min

Title: [58-01] Redis cache: Verify high-traffic routes
Description:
Check caching on hot paths.

**Routes to verify:**
- /api/analytics/overview
- /api/campaigns
- /api/posts

**Time:** ~20 min

Title: [58-02] Core Web Vitals: Measure LCP
Description:
Test LCP on key pages.

**Target:** < 2.5s

**Pages:**
- Landing page
- Dashboard
- Analytics

**Time:** ~20 min

Title: [58-03] Core Web Vitals: Measure INP
Description:
Test INP on interactive pages.

**Target:** < 200ms

**Test:**
- Button clicks
- Form submissions
- Tab switches

**Time:** ~20 min

Title: [58-04] Prisma query optimization
Description:
Review slow queries.

**Check:**
- [ ] N+1 queries
- [ ] Missing indexes
- [ ] Unnecessary includes

**Time:** ~30 min

Title: [58-05] Final CWV compliance check
Description:
Run Lighthouse on all key pages.

**Target scores:**
- Performance: 90+
- Accessibility: 95+
- Best Practices: 95+

**Time:** ~25 min
